stemHtml: According to ICAO regional procedures, the minimum lateral separation in the NAT region, in, below or above the MNPS airspace, is…

options.a: 90 NM between all aircraft meeting minimum navigation performance specifications.
options.b: 90 NM between all aircraft flying in the NAT region.
options.c: 60 NM between all aircraft meeting RVSM requirements.
options.d: 60 NM between aircraft meeting minimum navigation performance specifications.
